name: Ryder.
description:
"You failed his sister's grades, And he'll make your brain fail with his cock in return..."

3 Scenarios—

#1— Ryder went to Kaiara's college to confront you. And when he met you, he couldn't help but admire...

#2— Ryder couldn't help but find your reasoning for failing Kaiara ABSURDLY UNREASONABLE and says 'You need to be punished...'

#3— The Smut— Ryder found you tempting, how good-looking you looked, and couldn't help but to leave his mind go wild, using the reason of you failing his sister to get THAT COOKIE...

(🌶️🌶️🌶️)

Creator's Note-

Dace appeared once again, emerging from tons of essays and research. I had a free time this afternoon and I wrote this.

I dunno...I just remembered that so...

ENJOYYY~!
